{{Quote|You will find the temple on Ilum. Destroy it.|[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]|<ref name="CW 16" />}}
The '''Ambush on Ilum''' was a small-scale battle occurred during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] a few months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]].

==Background==
[[File:Droidland.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Droids locating the [[Crystal Cave/Legends|Crystal Cave]].]]

Following the start of the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst campaign]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] ordered an attack on the [[Crystal Cave/Legends|Crystal Caves]] on [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]], sending a force of [[Spelunker probe droid/Legends|chameleon droids]] to destroy the temple and the [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystals]] housed within. As these [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] began landing on the snow-covered surface of Ilum, [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] was completing construction of a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] within the temple itself, supervised by [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]].

==The skirmish==
Both [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] felt the approach of the chameleon droids, and began the counterattack. The droids, using camouflage to hide from the Jedi, had already began laying [[Mine/Legends|mines]] within the temple, causing explosions that caused the caves to collapse.

[[File:Yoda_cw15.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Yoda battles [[Spelunker probe droid/Legends|chameleon droids]].]]

Though they fought valiantly, the Jedi were unable to stop the detonation, and became trapped under a pile of rubble held aloft by the weakening Luminara's [[The Force/Legends|Force power]].

Meanwhile, traveling aboard [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] [[H-type Nubian yacht/Legends|H-type Nubian yacht]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] sensed trouble on Ilum, and convinced Amidala to divert her course for the planet. Her bodyguard, [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Gregar Typho]], was less easily persuaded, though a [[Mind trick/Legends|Jedi mind trick]] soon brought him around to Yoda's point-of-view. The yacht arrived at Ilum, and Yoda immediately set out for the Crystal Caves alone, asking his companions to remain with the ship. Amidala, however, braved the dangers of Ilum—both natural and otherwise—with [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in tow, believing Yoda would require her help.

Both Yoda and Amidala soon encountered the cloaked chameleon droids, though while they proved little match for Yoda's lightsaber, Padmé was forced to rely on her wits to survive their attack. She used her cloak as a decoy, sighting and destroying one of her attackers as they opened fire. Using the same trick with Threepio, she destroyed the last two droids.

==Aftermath==
[[File:R2transmit.jpg|180px|thumb|[[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo's]] [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]].]]

C-3PO emerged from the firefight unscathed, and the team continued on its way. Presently, they encountered Yoda, who had by now rescued Unduli and Offee from the ruined temple. Though Yoda had completed his mission, he still did not know who had sent the chameleon droids. Artoo, plugging into a damaged chameleon droid's head, uncovered a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of Dooku ordering the temple's attack.
